svg.title: Synthetic Spanish data pipeline — how it fits into VerifAI training
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how real datasets (LIAR, MultiFC, FakeDeS) and synthetic Spanish data are combined, balanced, and fed into the BPE tokenizer and transformer training loop.
svg.text: Synthetic Spanish data — where it fits

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the LIAR dataset')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the MultiFC dataset')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the FakeDeS Spanish dataset')
sendPrompt('How was the synthetic Spanish data generated?')
sendPrompt('What does prepare_data.py do in VerifAI?')
g.text: label mapping · EN/ES filter · class balancing · train/val/test split

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the training split composed?')
sendPrompt('What is the validation split used for?')
sendPrompt('Why is the test split kept separate?')
sendPrompt('How does the BPE tokenizer use the training data?')
g.text: BPE from scratch · 16k vocab · bilingual EN+ES

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the test set used in evaluation?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the VerifAI training loop')
g.text: expect higher ES F1 with more Spanish data
